name: Gassy Dragon Bossfight
description:
"Come to try again? That's cute..."

You've been stuck on this boss for quite some time, and it seems impossible! The first 3/4 of this dungeon was far easier than this, and a lot more pleasant smelling too. But now a big, fat, gassy red dragoness blocks your way forward, and has many humiliating attacks for you to endure.

[This is a fetish bot, and I've included an extra image as well.]
